'''Velmor: Royalty and Rebellion''' was an online supplement for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website in [[March]] [[2003]] as part of the site's ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series, featuring the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]] and other characters and settings appearing in [[Marvel Comics]]' [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' series]]. It was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]].

The supplement was split into four separate articles, including the reports and memoirs of [[Zeta Traal]], [[Chozz Wardle]], [[Debor Fyalko]], and [[Ergric Betos]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: A Diplomatic Report===
''…the Empire's diplomatic attaché, the conniving [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zeta Traal|Traal]], reports to her superiors on the wealth and resources of the secluded planet [[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]].''<ref name="Velmor" />

===Part 2: The Favorite Son===
''…the Royal [[Doctor/Legends|Physician]], [[Chozz Wardle]], delivers a medical, genetic, and psychiatric summary of the man who claims to be Velmor's missing royal heir.''<ref name="Velmor" />

===Part 3: An Elegant Weapon===
''…the Court [[Swordmaster]], [[Debor Fyalko]], offers a tutorial in the use, handling, and care of the archaic [[Velmorian energy sword]].''<ref name="Velmor" />

===Part 4: Hail to the King===
''…Velmor's unluckiest [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]], [[Ergric Betos]], bears witness to the events that took place the day of the new [[King/Legends|king's]] coronation -- when he failed to protect the life of a [[Velmorian]] [[Anod|prince]].''<ref name="Velmor" />
